## Summary

**Wallet signature authentication** for register/login: challenge-response flow with **SEP-53** message signing (Freighter, xBull, Albedo via Stellar Wallets Kit). Users prove wallet ownership without on-chain transactions or fees.

**Status:** Core implementation merged; **production verification still failing** in some environments — this issue remains **open** for end-to-end debugging.

---

## Background

Model B removed password/email auth. Users must prove control of a Stellar keypair before ZCore stores their profile or calculates base score from Horizon.

Flow:
```
1. Client → POST /api/auth/challenge { walletAddress }
2. Server → { message, expiresAt }  (5-minute TTL)
3. Client → wallet.signMessage(message)  [SEP-53]
4. Client → POST /api/auth/register/signed | /login/signed
            { walletAddress, message, signature }
5. Server → verify signature + create session data { score }
```

---

## Implementation

### Backend

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `Server/src/services/auth-challenge.service.ts` | Build/validate challenge, SEP-53 verify |
| `Server/src/controllers/auth.controller.ts` | `requestChallenge`, `registerWithSignature`, `loginWithSignature` |
| `Server/src/routes/auth.routes.ts` | Route wiring + Zod validation |
| `Server/src/middleware/schemas.ts` | `ChallengeRequestSchema`, `SignedAuthSchema` |

**Challenge message format:**
```
ZCore Authentication
Wallet: G...
Nonce: <uuid>
Issued: <epoch_ms>
Expires: <epoch_ms>
```

**SEP-53 verification** (commit `df9c727`):
1. Payload = `"Stellar Signed Message:\n" + message` (UTF-8)
2. `messageHash = SHA256(payload)`
3. `Keypair.verify(messageHash, signature)`

Official test vector must pass (see [SEP-0053](https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/ecosystem/sep-0053.md)).

### Frontend

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `Front/lib/wallet-kit.ts` | `signAuthMessage()` via Stellar Wallets Kit |
| `Front/components/wallet-auth-card.tsx` | Connect + sign + register/login UX |
| `Front/lib/api-client.ts` | `requestChallenge`, `registerSigned`, `loginSigned` |
| `Front/lib/auth.ts` | `localStorage` session (`zcore_session`) |

**Env:** `NEXT_PUBLIC_STELLAR_NETWORK=testnet|mainnet` must match wallet network passphrase.

---

## Known issues (why still open)

| Symptom | Likely cause | Action |
|---------|--------------|--------|
| `401 Invalid wallet signature` on prod | Stale deploy, serverless import failure swallowed in `catch`, or env mismatch | Check Vercel function logs; redeploy `zcore-api`; add error logging in `verifyWalletSignature` catch block |
| Error after valid signature | Missing `DATABASE_URL` on Vercel (#15) | Configure MySQL; run `prisma migrate deploy` |
| Generic error in UI | `wallet-auth-card` shows raw API message | Map 401/500/503 to user-friendly copy (follow-up) |

**Verified locally:** SEP-53 roundtrip returns `201` register with test keypair.  
**Production:** Same cryptographic signature returns `401` — investigate deploy parity.

---

## How to verify (local)

```bash
npm run setup && npm run dev:server && npm run dev:front
```

1. Open http://localhost:3001/register
2. Connect Freighter (testnet)
3. Approve sign message popup (shows "Stellar Signed Message:" prefix — expected)
4. Should redirect to `/dashboard` with score

**API-only test:**
```bash
# See Server/scripts or use SEP-53 test seed in auth-challenge unit test (#21)
```

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Challenge endpoint with 5-min expiry
- [x] SEP-53 verification in `auth-challenge.service.ts`
- [x] Register creates user + Horizon base score
- [x] Login returns score for existing user
- [x] Attestation endpoint reuses same verify (`contracts.controller.ts`)
- [ ] **Production register/login works on https://dapp-zcore.vercel.app**
- [ ] Automated tests in CI (#21)

---

## Security notes

- Session is **client-side localStorage only** — no server session JWT yet; AuthGuard does not re-verify signature on dashboard access
- Challenge nonce prevents replay within TTL
- Never log full signatures or secrets

---
